name: widget-equivalent-distractor-fail
description: Stem asks 'Which model shows 1/2?' Marked correct (index 0) is parts=2, filled=1 (= 1/2). BUT distractor at index 2 is parts=6, filled=3 — which simplifies to 1/2 as well. Two mathematically-equivalent 'correct' visuals → MULTIPLE_CORRECT (per CLAUDE.md §27 framing) AND DIAGRAM_INCOHERENT (the answer set isn't unique).

question.question: Which model shows 1/2 of the rectangle?
question.explanation: The rectangle is divided into 2 equal parts and 1 is shaded.
